subcodes.title: Lawh-i-Malik-i-Rus (Tablet to Czar Alexander II)
subcodes.first_line: O Czar of Russia! Incline thine ear unto the voice of God, the King, the Holy, and turn thou unto Paradise
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا ملک الروس ان استمع ندآء الله الملک القدوس ثم اقبل الی الفردوس مقر الذی
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @proclamation to kings; rulers; prominent individuals, @suffering and imprisonment, @status of kings; future of monarchy, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
